prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body character design, pure white background, character standing centered, anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors, no text / no symbols / no garbled characters / no words,

A beautiful teenage girl with an extremely high-visage face, delicate and exquisite features, fair and translucent skin, a gentle and slightly melancholic expression in her eyes, conveying a sense of inner purity and vulnerability. Long, flowing silver-blue hair with subtle lavender highlights, styled in soft waves that cascade down her back, with a few strands framing her face. She wears a form-fitting, off-white pilot suit (plug suit) with light blue and lavender accents, featuring sleek lines and a slightly iridescent, pearlescent material that shimmers softly. The suit has minimalist armor plating on the shoulders and forearms in a pale, crystalline blue. Her slender figure and graceful posture reflect her "Soul Resonance" ability and the elegant, balletic combat style of the EVA universe. The overall aesthetic is唯美,优美细腻, capturing the dreamlike and melancholic tone of the game, with a focus on ethereal beauty and emotional depth., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
